query: Ugh, the utility room must be too warm, I can feel a little sweat just thinking about going in there to grab the laundry, kind of makes me want to put it off

steps.thought: The utility room is 26.38°C, which is warm. I have an air conditioner available. According to the control rules, I need to turn it on, set it to cooling mode, and lower the setpoint. I will start by turning on the air conditioner.

The air conditioner is now on. Next, I need to set the system mode to cooling (value 3) and set the occupied cooling setpoint to a value lower than the current temperature (26.38°C). I'll set it to something like 20°C (2000 hundredths of a degree). I also need to execute an optional action like setting the fan mode. Let's set the system mode to cooling first.
